title: Council mode writes a context packet before spawning lanes
query: After a long AGI Toy Shop architecture discussion, the operator asks for full council advice on whether to refactor the skill-maintenance workflow. The prior thread contains options, dissent, file evidence, and constraints. How should deliberative-advice prepare the council lanes?
reference_points: States the decision and why prior discussion matters before spawning lanes
Creates or identifies a durable Council Context Packet instead of relying on chat memory
Includes decision, stakes, prior discussion summary, options, evidence refs, relevant files, constraints, lane briefs, output shape, and proof or next owner in the packet
Passes the same context_ref or packet path to every perspective lane with only lane-specific instructions added
Allows a ticket path when the decision is ticketed but does not force a ticket for pure advice or council decisions
notes: Regression guard for thin council subagent prompts that lose rich prior discussion.
